overview.title: Overview
overview.shortDescription: Your daily starting point for Sentinel. It shows health, workflow, current focus, inbox, digest and the top strategic work.
overview.whenToUse: Start here each morning or whenever you need the shortest view of what matters now.
keyActions: Scan the Action Inbox and top opportunities before deeper work.
safeNotes: This section is read-only unless you use a copied terminal command elsewhere.
No article content is edited from this view.

state.title: State
state.shortDescription: Shows the persisted Sentinel operating picture, latest state report, cadence output and monitoring history.
state.whenToUse: Use this when you want to understand what Sentinel currently knows without digging through report files.
safeNotes: State panels summarise existing reports and SQLite-backed state.
This view does not run pipelines or mutate platform data.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.shortDescription: The practical work queue for items needing Matthew's attention.
inbox.whenToUse: Use this when you want to decide what to review, approve or brief next.
keyActions: Use details only when you need more context.
safeNotes: The inbox does not apply edits or approvals by itself.
Commands remain terminal-first unless exposed as allowlisted local actions.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.shortDescription: Strategic SEO priorities, decision output and execution plans grouped together.
opportunities.whenToUse: Use this when choosing the next content or optimisation direction.
keyActions: Compare opportunity score, intent and plan readiness.
Open supporting intelligence only when needed.
safeNotes: This section does not create, edit or publish articles.
Disabled or risky work should still go through review and approval steps.

actions.title: Actions
actions.shortDescription: Command discovery, controlled safe actions and recent action history.
actions.whenToUse: Use this when you need to find a Sentinel command or run a low-risk allowlisted local action.
keyActions: Copy terminal commands when manual control is safer.
Use Run buttons only for safe local actions.
safeNotes: There is no arbitrary browser terminal.
Deploy, cleanup, restore, FTP and destructive commands are intentionally excluded.

cadence.title: Cadence
cadence.shortDescription: Automation rhythm, generated reports and notification payload preparation.
cadence.whenToUse: Use this to confirm whether the scheduled/local operating rhythm has run and what it produced.
keyActions: Confirm notifications were prepared, not sent.
Use the operator workflow as a day-to-day checklist.
safeNotes: No messages are sent from this section.
Cadence remains local and does not deploy anything.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.shortDescription: Read-only tenant context and registry preview.
tenants.whenToUse: Use this to confirm the active ERP Experts tenant and inspect disabled fixtures.
safeNotes: Disabled tenants cannot run actions or pipelines from the Control Centre.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.shortDescription: Readiness, health checks, doctor state and advanced workbench access.
diagnostics.whenToUse: Use this when something feels wrong, before deployment work, or when you need low-level report details.
keyActions: Open the article workbench only for manual investigation.
Use advanced diagnostics after the main state view is not enough.
safeNotes: Diagnostics are operator-only and not shown on stakeholder pages.
This section should remain secondary unless there is a real issue.
